## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no behavior change)

## Testing

How did you test this? Check all that apply:

- [ ] Tested with fresh clone
- [ ] Ran `/validate-setup` successfully
- [ ] Ran `/init-project` and verified output
- [ ] Tested on Windows
- [ ] Tested on macOS/Linux

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows commit convention (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md if adding a feature
- [ ] If adding an agent: includes memory protocol, works in both `.claude/` and `.opencode/`
- [ ] If adding a command: mirrored to `.opencode/commands/`
- [ ] No lockfiles added to `_blueprints/`
- [ ] README.md and README.es.md updated if needed
